# BrandON Ads
> Curated Hong Kong retail promotions, automatically scraped, scored, and published.

## Ad Pages
- /en/[ad_id]: Individual ad pages with brand name, offer summary, score, and image

## Data Feed
- /ads.json: Full structured JSON feed of all approved ads

## About
- Updated automatically via n8n pipeline
- Source: Meta Ads Library (Hong Kong)
- Publisher: BrandON (thebrandonapp.com)
